## Summary
Provide a concise summary of the changes implemented in this Pull Request. Focus on the "what" and "why" rather than the "how".

## Technical Details
- **Architecture**: How does this align with the v2 CHRONOS paper specifications?
- **Security**: List any security implications, particularly concerning plaintext blindness, time-bound execution, or attestable erasure.
- **Dependencies**: Note any new cryptographic crates or updated dependencies.

## Verification
- [ ] Tests run and passed locally
- [ ] Formatting and linting applied
- [ ] Formal terminology matches the specifications (e.g., "Pre-Erasure Commitment")
- [ ] Required CI workflows passed
